daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: A three-alarm fire in Brooklyn hospitalized five, while a surge in teen violence prompted Bronx DA calls for reforms; NYC's crime landscape remains tense with multiple shootings, and Mayor Mamdani seeks to end emergency shelter policies amid ongoing housing and health care challenges.
